Index.hero_subtitle: Bouncinn is an event-based social app that matches you with people in the same room, turning shared venues into instant, real-life connections.
Index.download_subtitle: Take the night with you. Get the app for event discovery, check-ins, matches, and rewards.
Index.download_page_description: See who's going to the same event or venue, and start matching with the people already moving your way.
Index.realtime_desc: Explore the nightlife scene as it unfolds. See who's where, find the best vibe, and make instant connections with people in the same room.
Index.promo_app_desc: Discover exclusive promotions, free shots, and VIP access directly on the Bouncinn app. As you bounce around the best venues, your loyalty turns into real rewards.
Index.quote_text: "Digital dating is broken: we are exhausted by endless swiping and the void between the screen and the real world."
Index.feat_promoter_desc: Optimize your PR strategy with data-driven insights by monitoring which promoter sold how many tickets or brought in how many guests in real-time.
Index.feat_promo_desc: Reach the end-user directly through high-impact mobile campaigns and personalized notifications.
Index.feat_target_desc: Define your target audience using integrated PR and event data. Reach the right people, not just "more" people.
Index.feat_analytics_desc: Use data insights to optimize promotions, pricing and capacity. Identify who attends your venue, their demographics and visit patterns. Track check-ins, entrances and event popularity in real time.
Index.feat_guest_sub: Smart guest list and check-in management for venues
Index.feat_guest_desc: You are gathering massive amounts of data from PR channels, yet struggling to pivot this into actionable strategies.
Index.cta_desc: Running a venue usually feels like juggling ten glass balls at once. Currently, your data and operations are scattered everywhere—and that’s exactly where you’re losing money. We're here to help you integrate Bouncinn's cutting-edge CRM and nightlife network.
Index.contact_success_desc: We will get back to you shortly.
Index.kvkk_content:
BOUNCINN KVKK PRIVACY NOTICE

1. Data Controller
In accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 (“KVKK”), your personal data is processed by Bouncinn Teknoloji A.Ş. (“Bouncinn”) in its capacity as the data controller.

2. Concept of Processing Personal Data
Under KVKK, “processing of personal data” refers to operations such as obtaining, recording, storing, preserving, modifying, reorganizing, disclosing, transferring, taking over, making available, classifying, or preventing the use of personal data by fully or partially automated means or non-automated means provided that it is part of a data recording system.

3. Processed Personal Data
Identity and contact information (name, surname, e-mail, telephone), user and profile information, location and event data, behavioral data, and technical data (IP, device information) are processed.

4. Purposes of Processing
Data is processed for the purposes of creating user accounts, providing matching services, improving user experience, conducting marketing activities, ensuring security, and fulfilling legal obligations.

5. Transfer of Personal Data
Your personal data may be shared with business partners, service providers, and authorized public institutions in accordance with KVKK.

6. Data Collection Method and Legal Grounds
Data is collected through the mobile application, web platform, and automated systems. Processing activities are based on explicit consent, contracts, legal obligations, and legitimate interest.

7. Data Retention and Destruction
Your personal data is stored for the necessary period and is deleted, destroyed, or anonymized at the end of this period.

8. Your Rights
Within the scope of KVKK, you have rights such as learning whether your data is being processed, requesting correction, deletion, and compensation for damages.

9. Contact
You can forward your requests to kvkk@bouncinn.com.
Index.community_content:
BOUNCINN COMMUNITY GUIDELINES
Last Update: March 18, 2026

Bouncinn is a platform where users can discover events, meet new people, and engage socially. To ensure this experience is safe and respectful, all users must follow these guidelines.

1. Respectful Behavior: No insults, harassment, or discriminatory speech.
2. Harassment: No spamming, unwanted sexual content, or pressuring for physical meetings.
3. Fake Accounts: No impersonation or automated bots.
4. Inappropriate Content: No pornography, violence, or illegal promotions.
5. Spam and Ads: No unauthorized advertising or commercial mass messaging.
6. Safety Tips: Meet in public places and protect personal info.
7. Reporting: Report offensive users or fake accounts.
8. Termination: Accounts violating rules will be closed.
9. Security: Automated systems for abuse analysis.
10. Updates: Rules may be updated instantly.
11. Contact: support@bouncinn.com
Index.terms_content:
BOUNCINN TERMS OF SERVICE
Last Update: March 18, 2026

1. Purpose: Bouncinn provides event discovery, check-in, and social matching services.
2. User Account: Users must provide accurate info and are responsible for account security.
3. Age Limit: Users must be 18+.
4. Conduct: Harassment, illegal use, and technical attacks are forbidden.
5. User Content: Responsibility lies with the user; no infringement allowed.
6. Services: Includes events, matching, messaging, and sponsored content.
7. Premium: Includes in-app purchases and subscriptions.
8. Third Parties: Third-party service terms apply separately.
9. Liability: Bouncinn is not responsible for user behavior or physical meetings.
10. Termination: Accounts may be suspended for violations.
11. Intellectual Property: All content is protected.
12. Changes: Terms can be updated at any time.
13. Law: Governing law is the Republic of Turkey; Istanbul courts are authorized.
14. Contact: support@bouncinn.com
